projectDescription: A REST API providing live CS2 marketplace data — listings, prices, floats, stickers, and FX rates — plus opt-in automated buying from your CSBoard balance.
keyFeatures: Live buyable CS2 listings with float values, paint seeds, and sticker data
minAsk price list grouped by market hash name, wear, and Doppler phase
Full price-list snapshot as gzipped NDJSON for bulk ingestion
FX rate table (USD base) matching the site's own payment flows
Opt-in automated buying debited from your CSBoard balance
Overcharge protection via atomic max_price_usd ceiling
Idempotency support to prevent duplicate purchases on retry
Bearer token authentication with separate read and trading key capabilities
Keyset (cursor) pagination on listings and prices
Per-key rate limits with Retry-After headers
